data.body: DONE (config-loop, commit 1d2d7983). Unified the sync model under REBAR_SYNC_PUSH/REBAR_SYNC_PULL, routed through the typed config. AC1 (canonical names + deprecation aliases + value flip): sync.push/sync.pull are the canonical Config keys (env REBAR_SYNC_PUSH/REBAR_SYNC_PULL already read by env_overrides); added legacy aliases in config.env_overrides — REBAR_PUSH->sync.push and REBAR_NO_SYNC->sync.pull, honored ONLY when the canonical var is unset (canonical wins), each with a deprecation warning. REBAR_NO_SYNC is a NEGATIVE boolean flipped to positive sync.pull (truthy->off, 0/empty->on). Added both legacy names to the load_config cache signature so toggling invalidates. AC2 (_TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC removed): deleted the private flag entirely; the 3 src readers now use sync.push/sync.pull, and all callers (5 test files + scripts/probe-rebar.sh + a subprocess env in test_next_batch) use REBAR_SYNC_PULL=off + REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off. AC3 (--no-pull flag): read dispatcher strips --no-pull (canonical) and --no-sync (deprecated alias). Consumers route through the typed config: _store/push.py _push_mode(root)->sync.push, reads._sync_disabled(root)->sync.pull, graph/_links push-guard->sync.push, reconciler subprocess sets REBAR_SYNC_PULL=off. KEY DESIGN: low-level call sites pass an EXPLICIT root (dirname of the tracker) so load_config does pure stat-based discovery and never shells out to git rev-parse — avoiding conflicts with tests that mock subprocess.run. Best-effort ConfigError fallbacks (push->always, pull->enabled) keep a bad config from breaking writes/reads; the verify gate (separate verify.* section) is untouched and still fails closed. Subagent review: design correct, fail-closed preserved; fixed 1 MAJOR (scripts/probe-rebar.sh still set the removed _TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC) + stale docs (concurrency.md falsely said the flag was still honored; README opt-out) + a dead test env key. Tests: 17 new (canonical, both aliases+warn, canonical-wins, parametrized value flip, env-beats-file, push/_sync_disabled consumers, --no-pull/--no-sync stripping). Full offline suite green: 1929 passed, 9 skipped. Docs: user-facing opt-out updated; comprehensive sweep is f81a.
